ChangeRequest.name: AE Requirements - Eligible for central bank funding - (ELGBL_CNTRL_BNK_FNDNG)
ChangeRequest.comment:
Currently in the LDM there's an entity _Eligible for central bank funding type_, with attribute `Eligible for central bank funding indicator`, related only to the entity _Debt security_.
In AE this concept is used in templates F 32.01, F 32.02.a/b, F 32.03.b, F 36.01.c and F 36.02.c and it is needed/relevant for loans and advances, equity instruments that are securities, and debt securities.
